name: apiosk-mcp
description: AI-native payments: discover, pay for, execute, and publish monetized APIs through MCP.
author: Apiosk

tools.name: apiosk_explore
tools.description: Browse Apiosk listing groups before narrowing with search.

tools.name: apiosk_search
tools.description: Search the Apiosk catalog and discover API-specific dynamic tools.

tools.name: apiosk_payment_guide
tools.description: Guide for paying through the Apiosk gateway — buyer (how to settle a paid call) and provider (how to publish and get paid).

tools.name: apiosk_get_api
tools.description: Get full listing detail and agent metadata for a specific Apiosk slug.

tools.name: apiosk_execute
tools.description: Fallback execute tool for any Apiosk API slug.

tools.name: apiosk_wallet_create
tools.description: Create or import a local wallet for autonomous pay and publish flows.

tools.name: apiosk_configure
tools.description: Show a structured wallet funding and Apiosk management menu, including QR output when available.

tools.name: apiosk_publish_api
tools.description: Publish an API directly to Apiosk with signed wallet auth.
